P.A checked the CC but could not confirm which type of PPS and DOD not clear;  Tracy checked Connect Care: Dr. Chhibber diagnosed with PD on January 12/22; now followed-up by Dr. Martino, who thinks participant may have PSP; re-check Dx after participant's Oct. 10/23 appointment with Dr. Martino
Dr. Bruno saw participant on unit on March 21/23, and diagnosed him with PD at that time (Dr. Bruno saw participant at MDC first on August 3/23)

column18: neurologist told patient they may have atypical PD (diagnosis is fairly recent so patient doesn't know for sure if they have PD)    patient is not currently taking PD drugs

the slowness of movement has always been distributed on both sides of body but the tremor has only been felt on right side
patient is not taking any PD medication
